reviewer: weekly-hardening-routine (headless Chromium 141 via CDP; no chrome-devtools-mcp in cloud env)

spec_match.rationale: Attribution is macOS Notification Center UI; the page correctly frames the rendering as manual observation and probes only the real gating inputs (platform, display-mode, permission).

interactive.rationale: Probe button fills the table from real reads; verified on Linux headless (platform Linux -> honest macOS-only verdict).

edge_cases.rationale: Covers non-macOS, non-installed, and permission states with distinct verdicts.

runtime_evidence.rationale: CDP run with screenshot inspected; before/after cards render side by side, AA contrast.

telemetry_health.rationale: Env-probe assert wired; KV not queried.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables; mock toasts clearly framed as mock-ups.

accessibility.rationale: Table semantics, role=status verdict, decorative icons aria-hidden.

summary: Honest OS-specific treatment: labelled comparison plus real environment probe.

openQuestions.title: Capture real macOS attribution evidence
openQuestions.detail: When a macOS device with Chrome 130+/152 is available, install the showcase as a PWA, fire a notification from the tester, and replace/augment the mock-ups with genuine Notification Center screenshots.
